tasks.text: Cut 1 lb chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces (1 inch cubes)
Season lightly with salt and white pepper
Toss chicken in cornstarch until evenly coated
Heat about 2 cups of vegetable oil in the wok to 350°F (medium-high heat)
Carefully drop coated chicken pieces into the hot oil in small batches — don't crowd the wok
Fry for 3-4 minutes per batch until golden brown and cooked through
Remove with chopsticks or a slotted spoon and set aside in a bowl
Drain most of the oil, leaving about 1 tablespoon in the wok
Add dried chilies, minced garlic, and sliced ginger
Stir fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant
